scores.correctness_notes: All key details match the gold standard: correct YAML structure, override options, type values, location formats, label env-var substitution, and auto-label names per protocol (pebble_service, service.name, pebble@28978 SD-ID).
scores.hallucination_notes: The `-svc` exclusion prefix syntax in services list (e.g., `services: [all, -noisy-service]`) is not documented in the gold standard and is not a confirmed Pebble feature — this appears to be a minor fabrication. Everything else is accurate.
